description: Warakamure Gedara Ahamed Mohamed Mazeen Vs. Divisional Secretary of Akurana and Others Warakamure Gedara Ahamed Mohamed Mazeen Vs. Divisional Secretary of Akurana and Others View More before Dr. Hon.D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Warakamure Gedara Ahamed Mohamed Mazeen Vs. Divisional Secretary of Akurana and Others Warakamure Gedara Ahamed Mohamed Mazeen Vs. Divisional Secretary of Akurana and Others View More
judgement_by: Dr. Hon.D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner was issued with a quit notice by the 1st Respondent under the State Lands (Recovery of Possession) Act, on the basis that the Petitioner is possessing a portion of land belonging to the State where the 1st Respondent office is situated; the Petitioner disputed it and challenges the same in this Application. Held – it is a land dispute; without judging his own cause, the 1st Respondent should have filed an action to vindicate its title; writ issued.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
